notable_excerpts: You mentioned that the solar factory is like 10 gigawatt.
Now with the commencement of solar production... these factories are huge.
We have talked a lot about renewable electricity generation.
We have 2,000 acres of land that we have got. And that is where the green hydrogen ecosystem can come in.
We are also focused on 30 gigawatts of battery manufacturing.
We have over 12,000 options on Shein now and we have been able to create the domestic supply chain.
The Mahakumbh, which I am sure all of you are familiar with... was the densest data consumption, population conversion that anybody had ever seen globally.
Transcript of the discussion on the Audited Financial Results... is attached.
We have had robust financial performance, keeping in mind, in spite of the weak macroeconomic situation.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, focusing on renewable energy projects and integration. Social aspects are moderately covered, with emphasis on community impact and supply chain. Governance is adequately addressed with transparency in financial reporting.
strengths: Strong focus on renewable energy and integration.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on social initiatives.
